## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss tax advisory needs for GrowthX's recent C-corp formation and Series A financing.](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has already formed a C-corp and is closing a Series A round (\~$12M at $80M post)](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Significant tax issue for co-founder due to suboptimal structuring of equity transfer](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Potential solution: Replace options with shares purchased via partially-recourse promissory note](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [Time pressure from investors (Andreessen Horowitz) complicating restructuring efforts](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)

## Topics

### Company Background and Growth

  - [GrowthX (formerly LLC) provides AI workflow services](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Rapid growth: Reached $5.3M ARR](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [CTO joined as co-founder in Sept, initially as contractor](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [Bootstrapped by Marcel, now closing Series A](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)

### C-corp Formation and Equity Structure Issues

  - [Transferred assets from LLC to new C-corp](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [Key mistake: Co-founder received options instead of founder stock](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Current split: 70/30 (Marcel/Co-founder), diluted by ESOP and Series A](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Co-founder faces high tax burden on option exercise (ordinary income vs. QSBS)](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)

### Proposed Solution for Co-founder's Equity

  - [Cancel options, replace with shares purchased via partially-recourse promissory note](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [Example structure:](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
      - [5-year note, matching 5-year vesting](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
      - [Annual forgiveness of 20% ($200K on $1M example)](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
      - [Company grosses up co-founder's taxes (\~$50K/year in example)](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [Allows co-founder to lock in current value, potentially qualify for QSBS treatment](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)

### Series A Details and Investor Pressure

  - [$80M post-money valuation](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [Raising: $12M from Andreessen Horowitz, $250K angels, $250K SAFE note](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [A16z pushing for quick close, complicating restructuring efforts](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)

### Current Compromise for Co-founder Equity

  - [Auto-vest 50% of shares upfront for both founders](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Remaining 50% vests over 2 years](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Co-founder considering loan to exercise 50% upfront](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [51% recourse loan, \~$2M liability (down from $8M for 100%)](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Evaluate partially-recourse promissory note solution for co-founder](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [Consider putting loan forgiveness terms in writing, matching vesting schedule](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Weigh tax benefits against co-founder's risk tolerance](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Communicate options clearly to co-founder, emphasizing choice and potential QSBS benefits](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Navigate investor pressure while optimizing founder equity structure](https://fathom.video/share/UXFrV2YcTm_qoegChv6F7XmUbLQn2MHN?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
